narrative:
Precinct Van Buren Township (precinct in Darke County) has 981 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.1 percentage points.
